content.text:
The neighbor atoms of atom index 37 (Carbon) are:

- Atom index 42 (Hydrogen)

Regarding file organization, I notice that `.geomconf_1940.xyz.view.json`, `file_log.txt`, and `geomconf_1940.xyz` require organization into appropriate folders. However, since the task was focused on identifying neighbor atoms, I will leave file organization as a separate action unless instructed otherwise.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 37, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
